name: Baked Artichoke Savories
recipeIngredient: 1 cup mozzarella cheese, part skim milk, grated
1/2 cup ricotta cheese, part skim milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly oil an 8-inch square baking pan.
3. In a medium skillet over medium-high heat, sauté onion and garlic in sherry until soft but not browned.
4. Lightly beat egg whites until they form soft peaks.
5. Spoon the beaten egg into a bowl and mix with whole egg, bread crumbs, parsley, dill weed, cayenne pepper, cheeses, and drained chopped artichoke hearts.
6. Add sautéed onion and garlic to the mixture.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake until set, about 30 minutes.
9. Let cool, then cut into about 24 squares.
10. Serve warm or cold.
